escalation.rationale: Active US-Israel war with Iran continues with high-level assassinations, energy infrastructure strikes, and Iranian threats against Gulf states.

ticker_items: Israeli strike kills Iranian Intelligence Minister Esmaeil Khatib
Iran threatens Gulf energy assets after South Pars attack
US-Israel casualty count: 1,444 Iran, 18 Israel, 13 US
Russia sharing satellite intel and drone tech with Iran
Child pulled from rubble of US-Israeli attack in Iran

middle_east.description: Projectile struck grounds of Bushehr nuclear power plant complex with no radiation release reported
Strike on Phase 14 processing facilities caused fire affecting 12 million cubic meters daily gas output
Cluster munition missile barrage targeted central Israel in retaliation for killing of Iranian officials
Bunker buster bombs targeted Iranian coastal positions near Strait of Hormuz
Israeli airstrike kills Iranian Intelligence Minister Esmaeil Khatib
Israeli strike on central Beirut as war expands
Iranian cluster missile kills elderly couple in Ramat Gan

middle_east.text: US had $10 million prize on Larijani's head, we did it for free
middle_east.speaker: Gideon Sa'ar
middle_east.title: Israeli Minister

middle_east.text: Gulf oil facilities are legitimate targets following attacks on large gasfield
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government statement

middle_east.text: The US could end the war with the Islamic Republic in the near future
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Last night, the IDF took out Commander of the Basij Soleimani and his deputy, and Secretary of the Supreme National Security Council Ali Larijani. The Iranians are safer without them.
middle_east.speaker: FM Sa'ar
middle_east.title: Israeli Foreign Minister

observers.description: Prime Minister Takaichi visits White House Thursday facing pressure from Trump for support in Iran war. The meeting threatens to strain the decades-old US-Japan alliance as Tokyo weighs demands for military assistance.

European NATO members have refused Trump's appeals for coalition to reopen Strait of Hormuz, citing political and strategic concerns. Trump condemned allies for benefiting from US protection without reciprocating support.
Central bank hiked interest rates citing sharply higher fuel prices driven by US-Israel war on Iran. Economic impacts from blocked Hormuz shipping affecting domestic monetary policy decisions.
Russia reportedly sharing satellite imagery and drone technology with Iran to aid targeting of US forces. The Kremlin denies these intelligence sharing claims as 'fake news'.
China maintains silence on Iran war, revealing prioritization of core interests over partnerships. Beijing's muted response contrasts with expectations of stronger support for Tehran.
PM Orpo states Europe should help secure Hormuz Strait but characterizes the conflict as a US-Israel war rather than broader Western engagement.

financial.notes: Oil markets pricing in long-term disruption as Strait of Hormuz attacks choke exports and overwhelm bypass capacity.

update_log.text: Child among survivors pulled from rubble of US-Israeli attack in Iran

Iran threatens Gulf energy assets as 'legitimate targets' after South Pars strike
IDF kills Basij Commander Soleimani and Security Council Secretary Larijani
Iran declares Gulf oil facilities legitimate targets after Israeli attacks on South Pars gasfield
Projectile reported to have struck grounds of Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant complex
Two killed in central Israel as Iran launches cluster munition barrage on Tel Aviv area
Israeli strikes set fire to Iranian South Pars gas processing facilities affecting daily output
